ReplacementChunks.ReplacementContent:
Discovery

Understanding the business, users, pain points and goals. We lay a solid foundation for the entire product lifecycle by conducting deep industry research and analyzing competitive landscapes to ensure your idea is viable and positioned for long-term success in the market.

  • Market research
  • Business planning
  • Product discussion
  • Competitive analysis
  • User persona definition

Wireframes

Mapping out user journeys and structural layouts. This crucial step ensures logical flow and intuitive navigation, reducing the risk of costly changes later on by providing a clear blueprint of the platform's functionality and user interaction patterns.

  • UX sketches
  • Low-fidelity layouts
  • User flows
  • Information architecture
  • Interactive prototypes

UI Design

Creating premium, high-fidelity visual interfaces and style guides that captivate your target audience. We focus on modern aesthetics, accessibility, and brand consistency to deliver an engaging digital experience that stands out from the competition.

  • Figma screens
  • Design systems
  • Modern UI compositions
  • Motion graphics
  • Brand guidelines

Development

Translating designs into clean, production-ready code with robust, scalable architectures. Our engineering team utilizes the latest frameworks and best practices to ensure optimal performance, security, and maintainability across all devices.

  • Enterprise SaaS dashboard
  • Web application
  • Mobile application
  • API integration
  • Database architecture

Testing

Rigorous quality assurance, automated integration testing, and manual checks to ensure bug-free operation. We simulate real-world scenarios and perform security audits to guarantee that your product is stable and reliable before it reaches your users.

  • QA dashboard
  • Analytics
  • Bug tracking
  • Performance testing
  • Security audits

Launch

Deploying the product smoothly to production servers with zero-downtime deployment strategies. We provide post-launch monitoring and continuous support to ensure your application performs optimally as your user base scales.

  • Live product
  • Business analytics
  • User adoption
  • Ongoing maintenance
  • Cloud hosting setup

<!-- Right Side: Text (65%) -->
                        <div class="ideas-display-panel" style="width: 65%; position: sticky; top: 120px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 40px;">

<script>
                        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
                            const listItems = document.querySelectorAll('.idea-list-item');
                            const texts = document.querySelectorAll('.idea-text-content');
                            
                            function setActiveStage(index) {
                                listItems.forEach(item => item.classList.remove('active'));
                                texts.forEach(txt => txt.classList.remove('active'));
                                
                                listItems[index].classList.add('active');
                                texts[index].classList.add('active');
                            }
                            
                            listItems.forEach((item, index) => {
                                // Desktop Hover
                                item.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                                    if (window.innerWidth > 991) {
                                        setActiveStage(index);
                                    }
                                });
                                // Mobile Tap
                                item.addEventListener('click', () => {
                                    if (window.innerWidth <= 991) {
                                        setActiveStage(index);
                                    }
                                });
                            });
                        });
                    </script>
ReplacementChunks.TargetContent:
<script>
                        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
                            const listItems = document.querySelectorAll('.idea-list-item');
                            const images = document.querySelectorAll('.idea-image');
                            const texts = document.querySelectorAll('.idea-text-content');
                            const imgWrapper = document.querySelector('.ideas-images-wrapper');
                            
                            function setActiveStage(index) {
                                listItems.forEach(item => item.classList.remove('active'));
                                images.forEach(img => img.classList.remove('active'));
                                texts.forEach(txt => txt.classList.remove('active'));
                                
                                listItems[index].classList.add('active');
                                images[index].classList.add('active');
                                texts[index].classList.add('active');
                            }
                            
                            listItems.forEach((item, index) => {
                                // Desktop Hover
                                item.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
                                    if (window.innerWidth > 991) {
                                        setActiveStage(index);
                                    }
                                });
                                // Mobile Tap
                                item.addEventListener('click', () => {
                                    if (window.innerWidth <= 991) {
                                        setActiveStage(index);
                                    }
                                });
                            });

                            // Gentle Parallax
                            if (imgWrapper) {
                                imgWrapper.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                                    const rect = imgWrapper.getBoundingClientRect();
                                    const x = e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width / 2;
                                    const y = e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height / 2;
                                    
                                    const moveX = (x / rect.width) * 10;
                                    const moveY = (y / rect.height) * 10;
                                    
                                    const activeImg = imgWrapper.querySelector('.idea-image.active');
                                    if (activeImg) {
                                        activeImg.style.transition = 'none';
                                        activeImg.style.transform = `scale(1.02) translate(${moveX}px, ${moveY}px)`;
                                    }
                                });
                                
                                imgWrapper.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                                    const activeImg = imgWrapper.querySelector('.idea-image.active');
                                    if (activeImg) {
                                        activeImg.style.transition = 'opacity 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)';
                                        activeImg.style.transform = 'scale(1) translate(0, 0)';
                                    }
                                });
                            }
                        });
                    </script>
